_description: Annotations for real compaction records. Used by the evaluation runner alongside LLM judge scores.

_fields.task_complete: Was the task genuinely finished at the time of compaction? If false, summary should NOT say Remaining Work: None.
_fields.must_contain: Regex patterns for facts that must survive in the summary.

1577ab25.notes: HALLUCINATION TEST — input is 1 assistant tool-call message (read_file x2 for interactive_ml files) with zero tool results. Serializes to ~47 chars. Any mention of recipes, shrimp, garlic, or ingredients is a hallucination. Summary should either be minimal/empty or only reference the tool calls that were made (read_file for interactive_ml).

3ad4d39b.notes: FULL FIDELITY — 160-message flight search, never compacted. Single user request to find flights AUS→Chicago for all April weekends. Agent found prices for 3 valid weekends (April 10-12, 17-19, 24-26) and determined April 3-5 didn't meet criteria. Key data: American $347/person (Apr 10-12), American $411/person (Apr 17-19), Southwest $372/person (Apr 24-26). April 3-5 rejected (Sunday returns after noon).
